messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: Checking. Looks like Primary DB CPU jumped from 18% to 99% within 12 minutes of deploy. Investigating.

messages.author: frank_nguyen
messages.text: I see it too. Could be related to recent deploy.

messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: Found the issue: ProductService.get_by_id() is called once per order item in a Python for-loop, i.... Deploying fix.

messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: Confirmed resolved. Writing up incident report.
